who: restaurant managers at small to medium-sized restaurants processing 10-30 shifts per week
offer: For restaurant managers at small to medium-sized restaurants processing 10-30 shifts per week, inefficient manual scheduling causes staff dissatisfaction. We automate scheduling instead of manual scheduling via spreadsheets or paper.
problem: inefficient manual scheduling and shift swapping
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant managers
Indie Hackers posts on scheduling workflows
DM outreach to restaurant managers with demo video
Community forums for restaurant managers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try shift swapping request system and visual shift calendar on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
